subcodes.first_line: Dearly cherished and esteemed friend, the content of your letter was imbued with an exquisite sweetness, for it bore witness to loyalty and fidelity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سرور عزیز محترما مضمون نامه شما در نهایت حلاوت بود زیرا دلالت بر وفا میکرد و
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @poems and quotation from poetry
